headline: Jim Cramer Says “We’re Going to Pull the Trigger on Home Generators, Generac’s Bread and Butter”
summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE:GNRC) is one of the S&P 500 stocks that Jim Cramer shared his take on. Cramer commented on the company’s latest earnings and forecast, as he commented: In sixth place was one we talk about a lot. It’s Generac, up 34% in February. This maker of backup generators and other energy equipment […]

headline: Generac Holdings (GNRC) was Hurt by Lower Demand for Its HSB Generators
summary: SouthernSun Asset Management, LLC, an investment management firm, released its “SouthernSun Smid Cap Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. During the quarter, the SMID Cap Composite returned -3.72% on a gross basis (-3.89% net) compared to 2.22% for the Russell 2500 Index and 3.15% return for the Russell […]
